title: Laserfiche 12 User Guide: Error Codes
notes: Opened in Chrome. Extracted official descriptions for seed entries and source-priority baseline.

title: 9013 - Laserfiche Answers
notes: Laserfiche employee Brian McKeever explains 9013 as a permissions issue and recommends checking effective rights, tags, and volume rights.

title: Error Access denied. [9013] - Laserfiche Answers
notes: Laserfiche employees Raymond Cruz and Alexander Huang replied. Thread suggests checking child records/folders but does not include final resolution.

title: Error 9030 on Named User - Laserfiche Answers
notes: Laserfiche employee Shule Wong requested LFDS event logs and build info. Community replies report license reassignment and 10.1 as practical fixes.

title: Laserfiche Answers search: 6508 user name password incorrect
notes: Chrome search for '6508 user name password incorrect' returned no matching posts in Answers at review time.
